question: What text is printed on the green rectangular label held by the hand in the earlier clips? A. WASHED AND READY TO COOK B. BEST BEFORE 04 NOV C. BRITISH UNWASHED SLICED CURLY KALE D. 300G e

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A pile of chopped green leafy vegetables with curly edges rests on a dark brown wooden surface. Clear plastic bags containing similar vegetables are positioned near the central pile. A human hand holds a package labeled 'BRITISH UNWASHED SLICED CURLY KALE'. A clear plastic container with a white label sits next to the loose vegetables.

Describe the sequence of interactions with the kale packages and loose vegetables shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a pile of chopped kale rests on a wooden surface near plastic bags; at 10s, a hand reaches towards a clear plastic container with a white label; at 12s, the hand holds a plastic bag containing greens and moves it; at 16s, the bag displays a green label reading British Unwashed Sliced Curly Kale.

canonical_answer: Chopped green leafy vegetables are dropped into the wok by a hand.
